01.name: Static Codes
01.description: Human-coded turn-by-turn orientations fed to Claude with a generic thematic analysis prompt. No temporal framing.

02.name: Temporal Codes
02.description: Human-coded turn-by-turn orientations fed to Claude with a prompt that explicitly asks how orientations shift over time.

03.name: Static Transcript
03.description: Raw classroom transcript fed to Claude with a generic thematic analysis prompt. No temporal framing.

04.name: Temporal Transcript
04.description: Raw classroom transcript fed to Claude with a prompt that explicitly asks how orientations shift over time.
